usage.title: How to Use Qwen Image Layered Editor
usage.description: Decompose and edit images with AI in three simple steps:

items.title: Upload Your Image
items.description: Click the upload button or drag and drop your image. The editor supports PNG, JPG, WEBP and other common formats.

items.title: AI Layer Decomposition
items.description: Click the Decompose button and Qwen Image Layered AI will automatically analyze your image and separate it into multiple editable layers.

items.title: Edit & Export
items.description: Adjust each layer independently with AI editing tools - recolor, replace, or remove objects. Export your creation in high resolution.

items.title: Advanced Features
items.description: Use recursive decomposition for detailed analysis, adjust opacity and visibility, and organize layers in hierarchical tree structure.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Qwen Image Layered
faq.description: Learn more about free AI image layer decomposition, RGBA layer separation, and automatic image editing.

items.question: What is Qwen Image Layered and how does automatic layer decomposition work?
items.answer: Qwen Image Layered is a free AI-powered image editor that automatically decomposes images into editable RGBA layers. Using advanced image segmentation technology, it identifies visual components and separates them into distinct layers - like Photoshop but automated and free. Simply upload an image and the AI handles the layer separation automatically.

items.question: Is Qwen Image Layered really free? What's the catch?
items.answer: Yes! Qwen Image Layered is completely free to use with no hidden costs. No credit card required, no signup needed. Our free AI image editing tool provides full access to automatic layer decomposition, RGBA layer separation, and AI-powered editing features.

items.question: How is this different from Photoshop or other image editing software?
items.answer: Unlike Photoshop which requires manual layer selection and masking, Qwen Image Layered uses AI to automatically decompose images into layers. It's a free Photoshop alternative that handles the complex task of image segmentation automatically - saving you hours of manual work. Perfect for quick edits and layer-based adjustments.

items.question: What image formats and file sizes are supported?
items.answer: Qwen Image Layered supports all common image formats including PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, and more. For optimal results with automatic layer decomposition, we recommend images under 10MB. The AI image editor processes your images securely in the browser.

items.question: What can I do with the decomposed RGBA layers?
items.answer: Once your image is decomposed into RGBA layers, you can: recolor individual layers using AI descriptions, replace objects with new elements, remove unwanted objects, adjust opacity and visibility, organize layers hierarchically, and export in high resolution (1K, 2K, or 4K). Each layer maintains transparency for precise editing.

items.question: How accurate is the automatic image segmentation?
items.answer: Qwen Image Layered uses state-of-the-art AI for image segmentation with high accuracy. The model excels at identifying distinct visual elements, separating foreground from background, and detecting objects. For complex images, you can use recursive decomposition for more detailed layer separation.

items.question: Can I use this for professional design work?
items.answer: Absolutely! Qwen Image Layered produces professional-quality RGBA layers suitable for design work. The high-resolution export (up to 4K) with AI upscaling makes it ideal for both web and print projects. It's especially useful for quick mockups, photo editing, and creative compositions.

items.question: Do I need to install anything or create an account?
items.answer: No installation and no account required! Qwen Image Layered is a web-based free image editing tool that runs entirely in your browser. Just visit the site, upload your image, and start using automatic AI layer decomposition instantly. No signup, no downloads, no hassle.
